segments.text: Again the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Son of man, prophesy and declare that this is what the Lord GOD says:
Wail, ‘Alasfor that day!’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For the day is near, the Day of the LORD is near. It will be a day of clouds, a time of doom for the nations.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
A sword will come against Egypt, and there will be anguish in Cush when the slain fall in Egypt, its wealth is taken away,
and its foundations are torn down.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Cush, Put, and Lud, and all the various peoples, as well as Libya and the men of the covenant land, will fall with Egypt by the sword.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
For this is what the LORD says:
The allies of Egypt will fall, and her proud strength will collapse. From Migdol to Syene they will fall by the sword within her, declares the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will be desolate among desolate lands, and their cities will lie among ruined cities.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
Then they will know that I am the LORDwhen I set fire to Egypt
and all her helpers are shattered.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On that day messengers will go out from Me in ships to frighten Cush out of complacency. Anguish will come upon them on the day of Egypt’s doom. For it is indeed coming.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
This is what the Lord GOD says:
I will put an end to the hordes of Egyptby the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
He and his people with him, the most ruthless of the nations,
will be brought in to destroy the land. They will draw their swords against Egypt and fill the land with the slain.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I will make the streams dry up and sell the land to the wicked. By the hands of foreigners I will bring desolationupon the land and everything in it. I, the LORD, have spoken.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
This is what the Lord GOD says:
I will destroy the idols and put an end to the images in Memphis. There will no longer be a prince in Egypt, and I will instill fear in that land.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I will lay waste Pathros, set fire to Zoan,
and execute judgment on Thebes.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
I will pour out My wrath on Pelusium, the stronghold of Egypt,
and cut off the crowds of Thebes.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I will set fire to Egypt, Pelusium will writhe in anguish, Thebes will be split open, and Memphis will face daily distress.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
The young men of On and Pi-beseth will fall by the sword,
and those cities will go into captivity.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
The day will be darkened in Tahpanheswhen I break the yoke of Egypt
and her proud strength comes to an end. A cloud will cover her, and her daughters will go into captivity.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So I will execute judgment on Egypt, and they will know that I am the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: In the eleventh year, on the seventh day of the first month, the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
Son of man, I have broken the arm of Pharaoh king of Egypt. See, it has not been bound up for healing, or splinted for strength to hold the sword.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Therefore this is what the Lord GOD says: Behold, I am against Pharaoh king of Egypt. I will break his arms, both the strong one and the one already broken, and will make the sword fall from his hand.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will disperse the Egyptians among the nations and scatter them throughout the lands.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I will strengthen the arms of Babylon’s king and place My sword in his hand, but I will break the arms of Pharaoh, who will groan before him like a mortally wounded man.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
I will strengthen the arms of Babylon’s king, but Pharaoh’s arms will fall limp.
Then they will know that I am the LORD, when I place My sword in the hand of Babylon’s king, and he wields it against the land of Egypt.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I will disperse the Egyptians among the nations and scatter them throughout the lands. Then they will know that I am the LORD.
segments.speaker: Unknown
